---
title: "Lecture 11"
subtitle: ENVX2001 Applied Statistical Methods
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMM YYYY"
format: html
---

**Lecture 11 -- Clustering**

## Part A

{{< pdf Lecture-11a.pdf width="100%" height="600" button="Download PDF" >}}

{{< pdf Lecture-11b.pdf width="100%" height="600" button="Download PDF" >}}
